primaryUse: Long-form interview synthesis, AI forecasting, intellectual taste, and high-context research extraction.

reusePolicy.summary: Use public transcripts, essays, and licensed repositories as source anchors.
reusePolicy.codeReuse: MIT-licensed repositories can be reused according to their licenses.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Public transcripts are reference-only unless the page grants reuse rights; do not vendor full transcripts.
